description: Style Note Now give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of sandals from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Product Details Light brown covered sandals with cut outs on the sides and a strap around the ankle with a velcro closure Soft and foamy foot bed Upper stitched to the outsole TPU outsole with multi directional lugs Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
